data.body: Implemented. _io/import_ndjson.py (two-pass orchestration) + _provenance.py (record->kwargs). rebar import CLI (FILE/stdin, --dry-run) + rebar.import_tickets(). Reproduces parents/links/tags/comments/file-impact/verify-commands + non-open statuses (in_progress/closed via STATUS, archived via archive()); provenance source_* preserved with fresh ids; dangling parent/link skip+warn; dry-run writes nothing. Tests: tests/interfaces/io/test_import_ndjson.py (5: round-trip≡logical state, provenance+fresh ids, dangling skip, dry-run, file round-trip). io 12 pass, contracts 77 pass. ruff clean. NOTE: idempotency + deferred-push are T4 (this importer always creates).
